title: gzip'ed files cannot be bulkloaded into DB
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM bar WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL;
DELETE FROM bar WHERE id = (SELECT id FROM bar WHERE name = 'test1');
key_bug_features: gzip'ed files bulkload failure in database
